message:
feat: PEP 440/508 parsers with conformance tests

Add package manager parsing infrastructure with comprehensive test coverage:

- PEP 440 version parser: epochs, pre/post/dev releases, local versions
- PEP 508 dependency parser: extras, version specs, URLs, markers
- requirements.txt parser: options, includes, line continuations
- METADATA parser: RFC 822 format for dist-info
- RECORD parser: CSV format for installed files

Key features:
- Version comparison matching Python packaging library behavior
- Arbitrary equality (===) for non-standard versions
- URL with marker parsing (space before semicolon required)
- Extras validation (reject missing commas, trailing commas)
- Local version validation (alphanumeric with separators only)

54 conformance tests extracted from Python packaging library.
